nasb.text: I will bring upon that land all My words which I have pronounced against it, all that is written in this book which Jeremiah has prophesied against all the nations.

esv.text: I will bring upon that land all the words that I have uttered against it, everything written in this book, which Jeremiah prophesied against all the nations.

cnv.text: “我必使我所說攻擊那地的一切話應驗在那地；我所說的，就是一切記錄在這書上的，是耶利米攻擊列國所說的預言。

ccb.text: 我借耶利米所说有关列国的预言都记在这书上了，我的话必应验在他们的土地上。
